question_text: Comment briefly on the development of art and technology during the Maurya period.

points.text: Stupa architecture (e.g., Sanchi) and the development of stone masonry.
Polished stone pillars and animal capitals showcasing advanced lapidary art.
Terracotta art and Northern Black Polished Ware (NBPW) technological progress.

question_text: Critically analyse the role of Sardar Patel in the Unification of India after Independence.

points.text: Sardar Patel as the 'Iron Man' and his leadership in integrating 562 princely states.
Use of 'Carrot and Stick' policy and the Instrument of Accession.
Specific cases: Junagadh, Hyderabad (Operation Polo), and Bhopal.
Establishment of a unified political map and administrative stability.
